The '''Jendar Campaign''' was a series of battles fought between the forces of the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] and the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] for the control of the planet [[Jendar]].<ref name="TCSWE" /> [[Ral Shawgrim]] was a veteran of the Jendar Campaign.<ref name="WBC" />
